cross_scene_arcs.title: Evasion and Cover Identity Construction
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Cara initiates an evasion plan upon learning she is being followed, selects Frank Taylor as a cover identity based on physical suitability, and stages intimacy to maintain the illusion of a romantic partnership.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: aware of surveillance and in possession of Orient Express ticket
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: successfully perceived as Frank's companion aboard the train
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Frank's potential resistance and the risk of exposure

cross_scene_arcs.title: Emotional Transformation and Relationship with Frank
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Cara's relationship with Frank evolves from a fabricated cover to genuine emotional intimacy, marked by symbolic gestures and physical closeness, followed by rejection and eventual reconciliation upon recognizing his true identity and agency.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: using Frank as a cover companion
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: choosing to flee with Frank, now recognized as Alexander Pearce, in a committed romantic partnership
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: conflict between loyalty to her mission and authentic feelings for Frank

cross_scene_arcs.title: Clandestine Operations and Mission Execution
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Cara engages in covert intelligence activities, from receiving coded warnings to decoding hidden messages, while maintaining deep cover and navigating internal and external threats to her mission.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: receiving a warning letter from Alexander
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: actively decoding mission-critical information under growing risk of exposure
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Frank's awareness of her clandestine actions and potential compromise

cross_scene_arcs.title: Rejection of Institutional Control and Autonomy
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Cara transitions from an agent under institutional direction to an autonomous operative, rejecting her handler and agency ties to pursue a self-determined path with Frank.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: independent actor who has severed ties with the agency and chosen personal allegiance over duty
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: long-term consequences of abandoning official role and evading institutional oversight

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Unwitting Target to Chosen Partner
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Frank transitions from an accidental encounter with Cara to being emotionally drawn into a constructed intimacy, where he is gradually positioned as her confidant and symbolic successor in breaking from her past.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Frank is an anonymous stranger selected by Cara for convenience.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Frank accepts a watch tied to Cara's past, symbolizing emotional inclusion and trust.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The authenticity of Cara's feelings and the long-term implications of the watch remain unclear.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Unraveling Identity and Trust
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Frank discovers the name 'Alexander Pearce' on the watch, investigates it, learns he is a lookalike used in a dangerous operation, and ultimately uncovers Cara's true role as an undercover agent.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Frank is unsettled by the engraved name on the watch and begins to question his reality.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Frank learns Cara is an undercover officer and that he has been manipulated within a larger operation.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Cara's true loyalties and the full scope of the operation remain ambiguous.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Physical and Behavioral Transformation
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Frank evolves from a reluctant participant into an active agent by physically transforming to match Alexander Pearce’s appearance and ultimately rejecting passive survival in favor of asserting control.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Frank learns he resembles Alexander Pearce and agrees to go off-grid.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Frank adopts Pearce’s physique and wardrobe, then publicly defies instructions to assert autonomy.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Emotional integration of the new identity remains incomplete despite outward transformation.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Survival to Agency
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Frank moves from reactive survival during attacks to active investigation, defiance, and finally the reclamation of a hidden identity, culminating in the assertion of his true self.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Frank is under attack and focused solely on escaping immediate danger.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Frank reveals himself as Alexander Pearce, regains control, and prepares to face incoming threats directly.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: External threats are still approaching, and long-term safety or resolution is not guaranteed.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Pursuit of Alexander Pearce
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ackerman leads a sustained multinational operation to capture fugitive financier Alexander Pearce, progressing from intelligence gathering to active field pursuit across Paris and Venice.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Decision to pursue Pearce after learning he is en route to Venice by train
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Team narrows search to Venice's San Marco district based on voice analysis
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Exact location of Pearce remains unknown; he continues to evade capture

cross_scene_arcs.title: Cara as Bait and Emotional Anchor
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ackerman uses Cara, Pearce’s former girlfriend, as bait in the operation while revealing growing emotional dependence on her, culminating in personal and professional loss when she rejects him.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Announces plan to use Cara as bait, showing visible emotional reaction to her image
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Cara ends their professional and personal relationship, leaving with Frank
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Cara's loyalty and safety remain uncertain; her departure leaves Ackerman emotionally exposed

cross_scene_arcs.title: Shift from Capturing Pearce to Exposing the Real Threat
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ackerman shifts focus from capturing Pearce to dismantling the broader criminal network, ultimately revealing his true objective was capturing Demidov and exposing internal corruption.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Briefs team on Pearce’s crimes and danger posed by Demidov’s retaliation
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Demidov is brought to justice and Quinn is arrested for complicity
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: True extent of internal corruption beyond Quinn remains unclear

cross_scene_arcs.title: Tension with Frank and Evolving Power Dynamics
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ackerman moves from viewing Frank as a disruptive threat to leveraging him as an asset, culminating in a grudging respect after Frank departs with Cara.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Frustrated by Frank’s unsanctioned presence and defiance at the restaurant
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Frank complies with Ackerman’s lead and ultimately leaves with Cara under Ackerman’s silent acknowledgment
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Frank’s role and reliability as an indirect ally remain ambiguous

cross_scene_arcs.title: Operational Control Under Pressure
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ackerman maintains authoritative command throughout high-pressure operations, asserting control during briefings, raids, and surveillance despite team dissent and operational setbacks.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Actively leading investigation and asserting authority over skeptical liaisons
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Holds team in position during Cara’s assault, reinforcing chain of command under extreme pressure
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Morale and team cohesion are strained by prolonged inaction and ethical tension
